overview: Tidewalker Spearer is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 55 HP, 16 physical damage, 80 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack2 Land at 180% ratio (288 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 Land (150%), Melee Attack2 Land (180%), Melee Attack Water (160%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
